summary: Building the 'I Got a Dom' plumbing/home services business website for a Chicago-based company. The hero section uses a wide banner image with Chicago skyline background (Image 1).
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Wide horizontal banner with a dark navy textured background, Chicago city skyline silhouette in the center-background, a plumber mascot in a shield badge on the left (man in navy cap and uniform with crossed arms holding a red pipe wrench), and bold text 'I GOT A DOM' in white and red on the right (hero-banner.dim_1334x750.png)

existing_features.title: Save the uploaded wide banner image (A1EB606A-8094-4BB7-93B6-3C6A9B809C15-2.png — navy background with Chicago skyline, plumber mascot shield logo, and 'I GOT A DOM' text) as the hero background image at frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-banner.dim_1334x750.png and render it as the full-width hero section background on the Home page.

new_feature_requests.summary: Hero section with wide banner/Chicago skyline background image (Image 1)
Professional plumbing/home services business website for 'I Got a Dom LLC'
